name: 06-23-split-chat-input
title: 拆分 ChatInput.vue — 抽 CodeMirror composable + latency popover
description: components/chat/ChatInput.vue 1833 行。拆出: (1) chatInputCodeMirror.ts composable(CodeMirror host + keymap + IME + trigger detection), (2) ChatInputLatencyPopover.vue(80 行独立 popover: open state + click-outside + Esc + body), (3) ChatInputHintRow.vue(token + latency + model 三 chip)。主组件降到 ~1000 行。
creator: Carlos-home
